Package cpdt.backend.exception

package cpdt.backend.exception
Defines exception types and global exception handling for the backend.

This package contains custom exceptions and centralized exception handlers used to provide consistent error reporting across the Digital Twin backend. It converts application and framework exceptions into standardized HTTP error responses for REST clients.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    cpdt.backend
    Implements the backend module of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin.
  • Class
    Description
    ErrorResponse
    Immutable standardized error response returned by the backend.
    GlobalExceptionHandler
    Provides centralized exception handling for REST controllers.
    InvalidTelemetryException
    Indicates that an incoming telemetry packet failed validation and cannot be processed.
